description: Caused by spells, spits, Prevent from seeing and casting spell on target
The charmed creature cannot perform harmful action against its charmer
Prevent from doing hostile and complex mental action like casting. And cannot approach creator of condition
The result of having 0 HP. Being unable to do anything
Cause by spells. Prevent from doing anything, except seeing. This is a body affliction. Each turn, a saving throw is allowed to end condition
Cause by spells or monster abilities. Prevent from doing anything. Creature is immune to poison and disease
Damage over time with poison damage, will give disadvantages
Caused by entanglement. Prevent from fleeing or approaching
Caused by spells, psionic, shock, explosion. Prevent from doing anything, except seeing. This is a mind affliction.
